name: Global uniques
uniques: Triggers a [Based and Christpilled] event <upon adopting [Christianity]> <for [Human player] Civilizations>
Triggers a [National Birthday] event <for [Major] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [3]% chance>
Triggers a [Help from the guild] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn start> <when at war> <with [40]% chance>
Triggers a [Gift from the guild] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn start> <with [10]% chance>
Triggers a [Special day!] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn start> <with [20]% chance>
Triggers a [You're pregnat???] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn start> <with [38]% chance>
Triggers a [Conquer them!] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon declaring war on [All] Civilizations>
Triggers a [Vague posting] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [24]% chance>
Triggers a [Idk what is this] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [4]% chance>
Triggers a [The Guest Star in starry night] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [10]% chance>
